spell.unique.wraith_beam.name: Ray of Death
spell.unique.wraith_beam.description:
Conjure a ray of [key.flavour.negative](pure) [key.flavour.negative](hatred) to annihilate your foes.
Deals [key.variable.positive]({0:P0}) of your [key.stat.power.necrotic] as [key.flag.necrotic] [key.mechanic.damage] to the first target hit.
